content.text: Implemented accessor protocol support for `@stdlib/stats/base/range-by`. Changes made: - Added `lib/accessors.js` implementing `rangeBy` for accessor arrays. - Updated `lib/ndarray.js` to detect accessor arrays via `arraylike2object` and delegate to `accessors.js`. - Refactored `lib/range_by.js` to delegate to the ndarray implementation (reducing duplication), while preserving existing special-case behavior for `N<=0` and `N===1 || stride===0`. - Updated existing unit tests to include explicit coverage for accessor arrays (no new/temporary test files created). Validation: - `make test TESTS_FILTER=".*/stats/base/range-by/.*"` passes. - `make examples EXAMPLES_FILTER=".*/stats/base/range-by/.*"` runs. - `make benchmark BENCHMARKS_FILTER=".*/stats/base/range-by/.*"` runs.
